name: Gaussian Mixture
description: Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) performs probabilistic clustering using multiple Gaussian distributions, allowing each data point to belong to clusters with varying probabilities.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and performs GaussianMixture clustering
output: The input DataFrame is passed along to the next Processors

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing features used to compute Gaussian distributions.

fields.name: k
fields.title: K
fields.description: Number of Gaussian clusters to be created during training.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Column containing the predicted cluster assignment for each record.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Random seed used for model initialization and reproducibility.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tolerence
fields.description: Convergence threshold that determines when training stops.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column specifying weights for each training instance.

fields.name: aggregationDepth
fields.title: Aggregation Depth
fields.description: Controls tree aggregation depth for distributed computation (>= 2).

fields.name: probabilityCol
fields.title: Probability Column
fields.description: Column containing cluster membership probabilities for each data point.
